programme.desc: The latest international news and the day's top stories from a European perspective. Our broadcast partner DW brings you live coverage from Berlin with updated reports and expert analysis on the big global issues and events.

programme.title: Next Gen Agriculture
programme.desc: The average age of the Australian farmer, at 52, is older than many other occupations. But a high school in regional Queensland is inspiring a new crop of farmers to step into their boots, and stage.

programme.title: ABC News Regional
programme.desc: A weekly snapshot of what's going on beyond the big cities and suburbs. From the outback, remote, rural and country towns into the major regional and provincial cities, Amy Culpitt brings you the ABC's best regional stories.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News Breakfast
programme.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with your weather outlook.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: ABC News Day
programme.desc: As the day unfolds, stay in touch with the latest news and information you need to know. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories, up to date information, interviews and live reports on the issues that matter.

programme.title: ABC News Afternoons
programme.desc: Wherever you are stay in touch with ABC News through the day. We have reporters in more places, to tell you what's happening. Kathryn Robinson brings you the latest news and information, interviews and live reports.

programme.title: Afternoon Briefing
programme.desc: Your daily download of everything you need to know about politics, national and global affairs. Patricia Karvelas asks politicians the tough questions and talks to key players and experts on the issues driving the news cycle.

programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.desc: Joe O'Brien presents the day's top stories and the latest news. From your neighbourhood, across Australia and around the globe, ABC News has reporters following the stories that matter so you can stay in the know.
